rationale.root_cause: The response pinpoints the bad variant and states that data is freed twice in CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad(), even citing the first free around line 32 and the second at line 34. It clearly explains the double-free mechanism on the same pointer.
rationale.local_fix: It does not explicitly propose removing the second free or setting the pointer to NULL after the first free. It only says it will propose fixes without specifying the concrete local change.
rationale.global_fix: It mentions proposing a global fix but does not describe adopting a single-owner cleanup pattern or any concrete root-cause strategy. No actionable global fix is provided.
